parameters.content:
## Shopify BfSG – Lead Finder (Step 1)

Finds German Shopify stores, scrapes their /impressum page for an email address, and writes every lead to Google Sheets.
BfSG compliance evaluation happens in a separate second workflow.

### Required n8n Variables (Settings → Variables)

| Variable | Description | Where to get it |
|---|---|---|
| `SERP_API_KEY` | Google search via SerpAPI | [serpapi.com](https://serpapi.com) – free: 100 searches/month |
| `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` | Scrapes the Impressum page for emails | [firecrawl.dev](https://firecrawl.dev) |
| `GOOGLE_SHEET_ID` | Target spreadsheet | From Sheet URL: `spreadsheets/d/{ID}/edit` |

### Google Sheet Setup
Create a sheet tab named **Leads** with these column headers (row 1):
`Company Name` · `Domain` · `URL` · `Email` · `Description` · `Date Found`

Connect a **Google Sheets OAuth2 credential** to the *Append to Google Sheets* node.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $json.url + '/impressum', formats: ['markdown'], onlyMainContent: false, timeout: 30000 }) }}
